description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized dostarlimab as a monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with mismatch repair deficiency (dMMR) / microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H) recurrent or advanced endometrial cancer that has progressed on or following prior treatment with a platinum-containing regimen.

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database

indication.indication: JEMPERLI is indicated as monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with dMMR/MSI-H recurrent or advanced EC that has progressed on or following prior treatment with a platinum-containing regimen.
indication.description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized dostarlimab as a monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with mismatch repair deficiency (dMMR) / microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H) recurrent or advanced endometrial cancer that has progressed on or following prior treatment with a platinum-containing regimen.
indication.raw_therapeutics: Jemperli (dostarlimab) in combination with carboplatin and paclixtaxel
